## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Datagrid.ai and GrowthX to accelerate Datagrid's growth and explore collaborative opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Datagrid.ai offers powerful AI agent technology for data analysis and task automation, with 200+ active accounts and rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes multi-faceted partnership: content generation, backlink building, strategic collaboration on use cases and product development](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Goal: Book next $800K ARR for Datagrid's new product as quickly as possible to demonstrate rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=2042.0)
  - [Partnership to focus on programmatic content creation, leveraging GrowthX's expertise and network for promotion and use case development](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Topics

### Datagrid.ai's Technology and Vision

  - [AI agents as the future of data interaction, surpassing human capabilities in repetitive tasks and data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Unique selling point: Combining ETL and AI agents for comprehensive data understanding and action](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Key features: Data source integration, context-aware agents, ability to perform actions (e.g., send Slack messages, create tasks)](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Vision: Agents that deeply understand company-specific data and contexts](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Current Use Cases and Traction

  - [Information retrieval from large document sets (e.g., 10,000 PDFs)](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [GTM use cases combining structured and unstructured data](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Calendar management and meeting prep automation](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Rapid growth: 1,000+ leads at recent event, 200 new users in one day](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Current ARR: \~$200K, aiming for $2M](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)

### Partnership Strategy

1.  Programmatic Content Generation:
    
      - [Focus on tool-specific content and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
      - [Leverage GrowthX's experience with similar platforms (e.g., AirOps)](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

2.  Backlink Building:
    
      - [Increase Datagrid's domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

3.  Strategic Collaboration:
    
      - [Create videos and customer use cases](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
      - [Joint webinars and social media promotion](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
      - [Potential product development based on GrowthX's client needs](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

4.  Use Case Development:
    
      - [Explore applications like territory planning for SaaS companies](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
      - [Develop AI-driven fit scoring for lead qualification](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)

### Engagement Structure

  - [Two distinct engagements:](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)
    1.  Content and promotion (GrowthX's "bread and butter")
    2.  Product collaboration and development (requires further definition)
  - [Aim for hands-on product feedback and workflow building](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=2173.0)
  - [Collaborative content creation and promotion across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to draft a detailed partnership proposal by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)
  - [Aim to start collaboration as soon as possible after agreement](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=2207.0)
  - [Define clear engagement structures, especially for product collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=2081.0)
  - [Explore how to leverage GrowthX's client network for Datagrid use cases and validation](https://fathom.video/share/4zd4ypiJLQqgymtyuq2yqHkpD4XtWsm3?tab=summary&timestamp=2146.0)
